base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of items_miscellaneous — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1988 mega man 2. Pickups — E-tank (new! stores energy), small/large energy, weapon-energy, 1UP, score-balls. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pickups — E-tank (new! stores energy), small/large energy, weapon-energy, 1UP, score-balls
